board_id.title: Board ID
board_id.description: The Monday.com board to write into (e.g. 9772074792).

group_id.title: Group ID
group_id.description: Target group on the board. Leave empty to use the default 'topics' group.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Process records in chunks of this size.

unique_key.title: Upsert Identity
unique_key.description: Defines how to match existing items for update. For the MVP, you can use item name by setting monday_column_id to __item_name__.

source_column.title: Unique Source Column
source_column.description: CSV column name that contains the business key (e.g. Request Number).

monday_column_id.title: Unique Monday Column ID
monday_column_id.description: Use '__item_name__' to match by item name. Otherwise, enter the real Monday column_id of a text column that stores the key.

field_mappings.title: Column Mappings
field_mappings.description: Map CSV columns to Monday column IDs. You can also map the key column to '__item_name__' to set the item name.

source_column.title: Source Column
source_column.description: CSV column name (e.g. Request Number, Brand, Due date).

monday_column_id.title: Monday Column ID
monday_column_id.description: The Monday column_id to write to (e.g. brand, request_date). Use '__item_name__' to set the item name.
